rule.name: AvoidCatchingThrowable
rule.message: A catch statement should never catch throwable since it includes errors.
rule.description:
Catching Throwable errors is not recommended since its scope is very broad. It includes runtime issues such as OutOfMemoryError that should be exposed and managed separately.
**Deprecated:** This rule is deprecated since PMD 7.18.0 and will be removed with PMD 8.0.0. This rule has been subsumed by {% rule AvoidCatchingGenericException %}, which is now configurable as to which exceptions cause a violation.
